name: io.github.autoworks-ai/autovault
title: AutoVault
description: Validates, signs, scopes, and serves agent SKILL.md files over local stdio MCP and remote Streamable HTTP MCP.

tools.name: get_skill
tools.description: Find and load installed skills by name or query, optionally inlining packaged resources.

tools.name: add_skill
tools.description: Install a known skill from a GitHub, agentskills, URL, or local-bundle source after validation.

tools.name: propose_skill
tools.description: Submit caller-authored SKILL.md bytes; runs the full validation, security, and dedup pipeline.

tools.name: update_skill
tools.description: Refresh an installed skill from its recorded source or replace it from a new source/bundle.

tools.name: delete_skill
tools.description: Remove an installed skill and its vault-local transforms, then refresh generated profiles.

tools.name: check_updates
tools.description: Detect upstream drift for skills installed from GitHub, agentskills, URL, or bundled inline sources.
